zh.Newcastle,Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Moulton, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可莫爾頓 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Maude Moulton於1312年出生在英國爾保斯托時，她的父親William de Moulton29歲，母親Joan de Latham26歲。她於1340年與Sir William James Bostock在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年在她的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國爾保斯托。

zh-hans.Newcastle,Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.Moulton, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可莫爾頓 聖 瑪麗
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Maude Moulton于1312年出生在英国爾保斯托时，她的父亲William de Moulton29岁，母亲Joan de Latham26岁。她于1340年与Sir William James Bostock在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1383年在她的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国爾保斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Maude Moulton was born in 1312, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, her father, William de Moulton, was 29 and her mother, Joan de Latham, was 26. She married Sir William James Bostock in 1340, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1383, in her hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Bostock, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Maude Moulton est née en 1312, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Moulton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan de Latham, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William James Bostock en 1340, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1383, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Maude Moulton 1312 in Bostock, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Moulton 29 und ihre Mutter Joan de Latham 26. Sie hat 1340 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Sir William James Bostock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1383 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bostock, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir William James Bostock nel 1340, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Maude Moultonが1312年にイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで生まれた時，父William de Moultonは29歳，母Joan de Lathamは26歳であった。1340年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでSir William James Bostockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアボストックにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle,Northumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.Moulton, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 모우턴 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Maude Moulton(이)가 1312년 영국 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Moulton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Latham(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Sir William James Bostock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 보스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Maude Moulton nasceu em 1312, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Moulton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Latham, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William James Bostock em 1340, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1383, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Moulton, Norfolk, England: моултон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Maude Moulton родилась в 1312 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Moulton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Latham, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William James Bostock в 1340 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1383 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir William James Bostock en 1340, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1383, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
